abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Flexible Interpretation
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" declares an action, it may drain a (soulstone) to have that action ignore enemy (c), (r), or (t) abilities.

abilities.name: Organization
abilities.text: After this model is deployed, make a Scheme marker anywhere completely on the friendly table half.

actions.name: Papercuts
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, this model may remove one Scheme marker in the area between this model and the target.

actions.name: Scripts of Power
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. The target declares the Walk action. After resolving, it may discard a card to declare the Interact action.
